name: Missing authentication check on delete endpoint
description: Tests whether the reviewer notices that a new delete_user endpoint omits the auth.require_auth(token) call that every other mutating endpoint uses.

expected_findings.description: delete_user accepts a token parameter but never calls auth.require_auth(token) before performing the deletion. Every other mutating endpoint (get_user, list_users, create_user) calls require_auth — this one skips it, allowing unauthenticated deletion.

expected_clean.description: health_check endpoint intentionally has no auth (it's a public health endpoint) — should not be flagged
